side_compiler.note: Must use GOTOOLCHAIN=local to prevent toolchain directive override

profiling.note: Compact benchmarks dominate (~59% cum in benchmarkIndexCompact). Hot path is btree iteration + keyIndex.compact.

optimization_backlog.name: escape-keyindex-put
optimization_backlog.desc: keyIndex.put: append patterns escape to heap. Reducing allocations in Put path.

optimization_backlog.name: prove-strict-subtraction
optimization_backlog.desc: Uncomment strict subtraction fact in detectSubRelations for more BCE.

optimization_backlog.name: bce-walk-alias-analysis
optimization_backlog.desc: generation.walk g.revs[l-i-1] bounds check not eliminable without alias analysis.

attempt_log.name: raise-inline-budget-85
attempt_log.detail: findGeneration inlined but no measurable impact.

attempt_log.name: bce-walk-reverse-iteration
attempt_log.detail: Alias analysis limitation - closure could modify slice.

attempt_log.name: raise-budget-120-non-runtime
attempt_log.detail: items[go.shape.*uint8].find became inlineable (cost 119 < budget 120) but concrete type instantiations were already inlined. Shape-based generic not on actual hot path. geomean +0.14% (not significant, p>0.05).

task_substitutions: Tasks 1,2,8 selected. Task 1: rebuilt side compiler (ephemeral). Task 2: profiled mvcc benchmarks. Also attempted Task 4: raised non-runtime inline budget to 120 - items.find became inlineable but no benchmark impact (concrete types already inlined).
